title: ophrys scolopax subsp. minutula
intro: Ophrys scolopax subsp. minutula, also known as the lesser bee orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The lesser bee orchid is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The herbal preparations of the lesser bee orchid include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
